title: Partner Application Submission
description: Apex OEM submits completed application form with company details, anticipated volume requirements, target product categories, and designated technical and commercial contacts

title: Credit & Financial Review
description: BuildWell Manufacturing finance team conducts credit check, reviews financial standing, and establishes preliminary payment terms and credit limit
requiredDocuments: Most Recent Annual Report or Audited Financials

title: Technical Requirements Assessment
description: Joint technical review to map OEM specification requirements to BuildWell Manufacturing formulations, identify any gaps requiring custom formulation, and determine testing protocol

title: Sample Production & Qualification Testing
description: AlloyTech Supply produces qualification samples per OEM specs. Samples sent to both BuildWell Manufacturing lab and OEM lab for independent validation against specification parameters

title: OEM Approval & Certification
description: Apex OEM conducts internal review of test results and issues formal approval or conditional approval with required modifications

title: Commercial Agreement Execution
description: Negotiate and execute supply agreement covering pricing tiers, volume commitments, delivery terms, quality warranties, liability terms, and intellectual property protections

title: Logistics & Supply Chain Setup
description: Establish shipping routes, delivery schedules, packaging requirements, labeling standards, and EDI/electronic ordering integration between AlloyTech Supply and OEM receiving facilities

title: Initial Production Run & Delivery
description: First full-scale production batch with complete quality documentation, Certificate of Analysis, and delivery to OEM receiving facility for incoming inspection

title: Incoming Quality Validation
description: OEM performs incoming quality checks on first delivery, validates against purchase specification, and confirms product meets all requirements for production use

title: Partnership Activation & Continuous Improvement Setup
description: Formal activation of partnership with establishment of regular business reviews, KPI tracking, continuous improvement program, and escalation procedures
